style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow crimson beneath Cubone's bone mask, emitting intense heat shimmer that distorts the air in waves. Ember sparks swirl upward in lazy spirals, leaving faint smoke trails that dissipate into the air. A crackling crimson aura pulses around its body, casting warm amber light that illuminates the ground in flickering patterns. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
